chunks.title: Promise of Restoration for Zion
chunks.reason: A unified prophetic declaration describing God's commitment to restore Jerusalem's glory and relationship with Him.

chunks.title: Call for Watchmen
chunks.reason: A specific instruction to appointed watchmen to persistently pray for Jerusalem's establishment.

chunks.title: Assurance of Provision
chunks.reason: A divine oath guaranteeing that the people will enjoy their harvest rather than their enemies.

chunks.title: Preparation for Return
chunks.reason: A call to clear the way and announce the coming salvation and new identity of the people.
